name: C-8 --emit-walk writes the EU AI Act traversal log showing Article 5 and Annex III checks per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit r.yaml --emit-walk walk.txt && [ -s walk.txt ] && grep -q 'Article 5' walk.txt && grep -q 'Annex III' walk.txt && echo traversed 1>&2
